introSection: Bubbles The Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Storybook Land in Egg Harbor Township, New Jersey, USA. It was built by E&F Miler Industries and opened in 2000. The ride is themed to Bubbles, a sea serpent.
fullText:
Bubbles The Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Storybook Land in Egg Harbor Township, New Jersey, USA. It was built by E&F Miler Industries and opened in 2000. The ride is themed to Bubbles, a sea serpent.



Pink track and gray supports.
